diary_entries.entry: Population: 32. Small meteorite impacts near colony. I spent the year on prayer. Closest to Selene-1.
Population: 32. Small meteorite impacts near colony. I spent the year on sabotage. Closest to Iris.
The meteorite changed everything. I feel worried about our future here.

meta_awareness: Titan (year 76): 'The sub-simulations we run to model our governance... what if we are someone else's sub-simulation? What if our decisions are being evaluated from outside?'
